markdownRemark.excerpt: Assalām ʿalaikum wa raḥmatulahi wa barkatuhu InshaAllāh we will be having the Taharah class tomorrow, from 5-8pm room 302 Azreili theater. Could you please pass…
markdownRemark.html:
Assalām ʿalaikum wa raḥmatulahi wa barkatuhu

InshaAllāh we will be having the Taharah class tomorrow, from 5-8pm room 302 Azreili theater.

Could you please pass on the message

JazzakumAllāh khairan
